name: mhaseeb-portfolio
description: Muhammad Haseeb's professional portfolio — AI Integration Engineer & Senior Full-Stack Developer. This endpoint exposes structured portfolio data for AI agents.

tools.name: getProfile
tools.description: Get Muhammad Haseeb's professional profile summary including bio, location, availability, and key stats

tools.name: getSkills
tools.description: Get technical skills organized by category with proficiency levels

tools.name: searchProjects
tools.description: Search portfolio projects by keyword, technology, or category

query.description: Search term to filter projects (matches title, description, tech stack, or category)

tools.name: getEducation
tools.description: Get education history, degrees, GPA, and publications

tools.name: getContactInfo
tools.description: Get contact information and availability for hiring
